summary: PR #2505 updates src/melee/lb/lb_00CE.c to match powi with a natural exponent loop and improve lb_8000D148 fuzzy matching by rearranging floating-point temporaries and operations while preserving stack frame shape according to the PR body.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; contains powi loop rewrite and lb_8000D148 local/operation ordering changes.

what_changed.text: Replaced powi's generated-looking eight-power unrolled block and remainder logic with a simple for loop using i < exponent and result *= base.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: powi removes exp_minus_8/remaining/powers_done and adds s32 i plus for (; i < exponent; i++) result *= base
human_pr_text: 'match powi with a natural exponent loop'

what_changed.text: Reordered lb_8000D148 floating-point local declarations and computations: introduced a cross temporary, reused dist_01 for squared distance before sqrtf, and split squared-distance accumulation into stepwise assignments.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_8000D148 adds cross temporary and changes dist_01/dist_squared_02/dist_squared_12 computation order
human_pr_text: lb_8000D148 improved from 86.3% to 98.9% fuzzy match while preserving correct stack frame shape

what_changed.text: Reported verification includes powi exact match, lb_8000D148 98.85714% fuzzy match, and successful GALE01 build.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: decomp-dev bot report lists powi 100.00% and lb_8000D148 98.86%

smart_moves.text: Used a natural source-level loop for repeated exponent multiplication instead of retaining an unrolled generated block.
For lb_8000D148, targeted local ordering and expression staging rather than changing function scope or adding new files.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: only local variable and expression ordering changes in lb_8000D148

smart_moves.text: Included narrow checkdiff evidence for both touched functions plus a full build result in the PR body.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: checkdiff powi, checkdiff lb_8000D148, configure+ninja GALE01 OK

decomp_lessons.lesson: When an integer power helper shows repeated multiplication with generated-looking unrolled blocks, test a natural counted loop before keeping the unrolled form.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: powi unrolled eight-multiply logic replaced by for loop

decomp_lessons.lesson: For fuzzy improvements in floating-point geometry code, declaration order, temporary lifetime, and staged multiply/add ordering can materially affect matching while preserving readable source.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_8000D148 declaration and computation ordering changes
human_pr_text: lb_8000D148 improved to 98.85714% fuzzy match while preserving stack frame shape

naming_conventions.text: The powi loop counter was simplified to the short local name i after replacing powers_done/remaining/exp_minus_8 with a natural loop.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: powi replaces exp_minus_8, remaining, powers_done with s32 i

naming_conventions.text: lb_8000D148 uses descriptive geometry-style local names such as diff_01_x, diff_01_y, dist_01, cross, threshold_squared, dist_squared_02, and dist_squared_12.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: powi changed from an unrolled multiplication structure to a simple counted for loop and was reported as matching.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Stack/local-shape tuning via declaration and assignment order
assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: lb_8000D148 adjusted local declaration order, introduced a cross temporary, and split arithmetic into staged assignments; PR body says this improved fuzzy matching while preserving stack frame shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_8000D148 local and expression staging changes
human_pr_text: correct stack frame shape and 98.85714% fuzzy match

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The PR cites function-specific checkdiff commands and a GALE01 build result for the touched unit.

review_feedback.text: No human review comments are present in the loaded PR slice. The only loaded comment is the decomp-dev bot report confirming one new match and one unmatched-item improvement.

follow_up_queries: lb_8000D148 stack frame shape fuzzy match

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, author, dates, changed file counts
notes: Loaded evidence includes the full diff and PR body, sufficient for changed files, tactics, and verification claims.
No human review comments were loaded, so reviewer intent or requested changes cannot be inferred.
The lb_8000D148 function is still reported as a fuzzy improvement, not an exact match; do not treat it as fully matched.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Natural counted loops can replace generated-looking unrolled exponentiation
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2505, powi in src/melee/lb/lb_00CE.c matched after replacing an unrolled eight-multiply/remainder structure with a simple for loop over exponent.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use staged float temporaries and declaration order carefully for stack-sensitive fuzzy improvements
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2505 improved lb_8000D148 fuzzy score from about 86.3% to about 98.9% by changing local order and arithmetic staging while the PR body says stack frame shape was preserved.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_8000D148 staged arithmetic and local order
human_pr_text: fuzzy score and stack frame statement

source_update_candidates.title: Add powi as a concrete natural-loop example
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding PR #2505 as an example under the natural-loops standard: powi matched after replacing unrolled exponent multiplication with a simple counted loop.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: match powi with a natural exponent loop
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded global standards already endorse natural loops; this PR provides a compact concrete historical example for curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not record lb_8000D148 as fully matched; evidence only supports a fuzzy improvement to approximately 98.86%.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments are present.
Do not generalize the exact lb_8000D148 arithmetic ordering as a global style rule without more examples or objdiff details.
